result:
All 10 tests pass (14 sub-cases total). Here's what was implemented:

**`internal/handler/routes.go`** — Two route registration functions:
- `RegisterRoutes` — creates a `MemoryStore` internally (used by `main.go`)
- `RegisterRoutesWithStore` — accepts a store (used by tests for control)

Five handler closures wired to endpoints:
| Method | Path | Handler | Status codes |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/products` | `listProducts` — pagination via `page`/`per_page` query params (defaults 1, 10) | 200 |
| GET | `/api/products/:id` | `getProduct` | 200, 404 |
| POST | `/api/products` | `createProduct` — validates `name` (required) and `price` (required, >0) via Gin binding | 201, 400 |
| PUT | `/api/products/:id` | `updateProduct` | 200, 400, 404 |
| DELETE | `/api/products/:id` | `deleteProduct` | 200, 404 |

**`internal/handler/handler_test.go`** — Comprehensive tests covering: empty list, create+list, get existing, get not found, update, update not found, delete, delete not found, pagination (including beyond-range page), and validation errors (missing name, missing price, zero price, negative price, empty body).
